name: Warrior Girl Corp.
summary: Warrior Girl Corp. focuses on online projects spanning B2C operations, financial services, Web hosting, Web services, and social media. The company also acts as an incubator for online start-up businesses and provides expertise and funding to development stage entities in the Web arena. It acquires and builds various Websites. The company was formerly known as Legacy Home California, LLC and changed its name to Warrior Girl Corp. in September 2004. Warrior Girl Corp. was incorporated in 2002 and is based in Reno, Nevada.
